basic_details.job_title: DRDO ACEM Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27: Vacancy, Eligibility & Apply Details
basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Energetic Materials (ACEM), DRDO
basic_details.short_information: The ACEM Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27 notification has been released by the Advanced Centre for Energetic Materials (ACEM), a facility under the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), Ministry of Defence, for the engagement of Graduate and Technician Apprentices for the year 2026-27. As per the official advertisement (Advt. No. ACEM/HRD/APPRENTICESHIP/2026-27), the recruitment falls under the Notification Released / Application Open stage, with the last date for receipt of application being 26th July 2026. This article covers a single recruitment notification that includes two

application_fee.details: Not Announced Yet. The official notification does not mention any application fee for ACEM Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27.

age_limit.details: Age limit is Not Announced Yet in the official notification. | Not Announced Yet.

qualification.details: The notification does not specify a separate nationality clause; however, candidates applying under SC/ST/OBC-Non-Creamy Layer categories must produce caste certificates in the prescribed format issued by a competent authority. | Refer to the Vacancy Details tables above for post-wise essential qualification. In addition to the qualification, the following conditions apply to all applicants: | Only fresh pass-out candidates who completed their respective courses in 2024, 2025, or 2026 can apply. Graduate/Diploma degree holders who have training or job experience of one year or more after attaining the essential qualification are NOT eligible to be engaged as an apprentice under the Apprentices Act. Candidates must register on the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS 2.0) portal (nats.education.gov.in).

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: B.E/B.Tech in Computer & Information Science/Computer Engineering/B.Sc in Computer Science
B.E/B.Tech in Electrical/Electrical and Instrumentation Engineering
Diploma in Computer Science/Computer Science & Information Technology/Web Designing

post_wise_breakdown.essential_qualification: B.E/B.Tech in Computer & Information Science/Computer Engineering/B.Sc in Computer Science
B.E/B.Tech in Electrical/Electrical and Instrumentation Engineering
Diploma in Computer Science/Computer Science & Information Technology/Web Designing

selection_process: The selection procedure will be decided by the Apprentice Selection Committee on the basis of merit/interview. Only selected candidates will be informed through an offer letter.
how_to_apply: Download and fill the Application Form (enclosed with the official notification) by typing.
Affix a recent passport-size photograph and sign the application form.
Attach all essential supporting documents/certificates, including the CGPA to Percentage conversion formula document.
Combine the filled application form and all documents into a single PDF file.
Register on the NATS 2.0 portal (nats.education.gov.in) before applying.
Send the scanned single PDF via email only to [email protected].
Ensure the application reaches on or before 26 July 2026. Do not send any hard copy.

content_sections.heading: Quick Highlights
content_sections.text: Organization: Advanced Centre for Energetic Materials (ACEM), DRDO Post Name: Graduate Apprentice (BE/B.Tech/General Stream) and Technician Apprentice (Diploma) Total Vacancies: 41 (30 Graduate Apprentice + 11 Technician Apprentice) Apply Mode: Offline (via email, application form attached with notification) Start Date: Not Announced Yet Last Date: 26 July 2026 Qualification: BE/B.Tech/B.Sc/B.Com/BLIS (Graduate Apprentice); Diploma in Engineering/Computer Science (Technician Apprentice) Age Limit: Not Announced Yet

content_sections.heading: Notification PDF and Official Website
content_sections.text: Candidates are advised to read the complete official notification and application form carefully before applying. Official Notification: Advt. No. ACEM/HRD/APPRENTICESHIP/2026-2 7, dated 01 July 2026 Contact Email: [email protected] NATS 2.0 Registration Portal: nats.education.gov.in

B.E/B.Tech in Electrical/Electrical and Instrumentation Engineering
Diploma in Computer Science/Computer Science & Information Technology/Web Designing

tables.caption: Reservation Slots (as per Apprentices Act policy)

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: The notification does not specify a separate nationality clause; however, candidates applying under SC/ST/OBC-Non-Creamy Layer categories must produce caste certificates in the prescribed format issued by a competent authority. Refer to the Vacancy Details tables above for post-wise essential qualification. In addition to the qualification, the following conditions apply to all applicants: Only fresh pass-out candidates who completed their respective courses in 2024, 2025, or 2026 can apply. Graduate/Diploma degree holders who have training or job experience of one year or more after attaining the essential qualification are NOT eligible to be engaged as an apprentice under the Apprentices Act. Candidates must register on the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS 2.0) portal (nats.education.gov.in).

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age limit is Not Announced Yet in the official notification. Not Announced Yet.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Not Announced Yet. The official notification does not mention any application fee for ACEM Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: The selection procedure will be decided by the Apprentice Selection Committee on the basis of merit/interview. Only selected candidates will be informed through an offer letter.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Duly filled (typed) Application Form with recent passport-size photograph affixed and signed NATS 2.0 Registration/Enrollment Number Aadhar Card of the candidate Educational qualification documents (Diploma/Degree onwards, in chronological order) University/College CGPA to Percentage conversion formula document (compulsory attachment) Caste Certificate in prescribed format (for SC/ST/OBC-Non-Creamy Layer candidates) Medical Fitness Certificate and Police Verification Certificate (to be submitted at the time of joining, if selected)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Download and fill the Application Form (enclosed with the official notification) by typing. Affix a recent passport-size photograph and sign the application form. Attach all essential supporting documents/certificates, including the CGPA to Percentage conversion formula document. Combine the filled application form and all documents into a single PDF file. Register on the NATS 2.0 portal (nats.education.gov.in) before applying. Send the scanned single PDF via email only to [email protected] . Ensure the application reaches on or before 26 July 2026. Do not send any hard copy.

faq.question: Q1. What is ACEM Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: ACEM Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27 is an engagement drive by the Advanced Centre for Energetic Materials (ACEM), DRDO, for one-year Graduate and Technician Apprentice training under the Apprentices Act 1961.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for ACEM Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of application is 26th July 2026, via email only.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are there in ACEM Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 41 total vacancies- 30 for Graduate Apprentice and 11 for Technician Apprentice (Diploma) categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility for ACEM Graduate Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a BE/B.Tech in the relevant engineering discipline, or B.Sc in Chemistry/Physics/Computer Science, or B.Com, or BLIS, depending on the specific post. Only fresh pass-outs of 2024, 2025, or 2026 are eligible.

faq.question: Q5. What is the stipend for ACEM apprentices?
faq.answer: Graduate Apprentices receive a stipend of ₹12,300/- per month, while Technician Apprentices (Diploma) receive ₹10,900/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for ACEM Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Not Announced Yet. The official notification does not mention any application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for ACEM Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is decided by the Apprentice Selection Committee on the basis of merit/interview. Only selected candidates are informed through an offer letter.

faq.question: Q8. How to apply for ACEM Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must fill the application form by typing, attach required documents in a single PDF, and email it to [email protected] on or before 26 July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Is NATS 2.0 registration mandatory for ACEM apprentices?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates applying for Graduate Apprentice and Technician Apprentice (Diploma) posts must register on the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS 2.0) portal.

faq.question: Q10. Which candidates are eligible to apply for ACEM apprenticeship?
faq.answer: Only fresh pass-out candidates who completed their respective courses in 2024, 2025, or 2026 are eligible. Candidates with one year or more of training/job experience after attaining the qualification are not eligible under the Apprentices Act.
